subtitle.en: Match resin performance with the right surface process to make every part work better, look sharper and stay cost-effective.
subtitle.zh: 让材料性能与表面工艺精准匹配，让每一个零件更好用、更好看，也更具成本效率。

signalCenter.zh:
性能
外观
成本

title.en: Start with what the part needs to do
title.zh: 先从零件要做什么出发

subtitle.en: Strength, clarity, wear resistance or safety — each resin route is selected around the real application, not a one-size-fits-all list.
subtitle.zh: 强度、透明度、耐磨性或安全要求——我们从真实应用出发匹配材料，而不是套用单一答案。

desc.en: Good impact resistance and easy finishing, widely used for electronic housings, small appliance parts and general plastic components.
desc.zh: 抗冲击性能和加工性能较好，适用于电子产品外壳、小家电配件及通用塑胶零部件。

imageAlt.en: ABS resin and molded part sample
imageAlt.zh: ABS 原料与注塑件样品

desc.en: High strength, optical clarity and impact resistance for transparent covers, protective windows and demanding structural parts.
desc.zh: 强度高、透明性好且抗冲击，适用于透明罩、防护窗口及高要求结构件。

desc.en: Balances PC strength with ABS moldability, commonly used in electronic housings, automotive plastic parts and industrial components.
desc.zh: 结合 PC 强度与 ABS 加工性，常用于电子外壳、汽车塑胶件和工业塑胶零部件。

imageAlt.en: PC and ABS blend molded housing sample

desc.en: Lightweight with good chemical resistance, suitable for home products, containers, fittings and functional plastic parts.
desc.zh: 材料轻、耐化学性较好，适用于家居产品、容器、配件及功能性塑胶件。

desc.en: Flexible and chemically stable for packaging parts, protective components and general molded plastic parts.
desc.zh: 韧性和耐化学性较好，适用于包装件、防护件及通用塑胶零部件。

desc.en: High strength, wear resistance and mechanical performance for gears, brackets, connectors and structural parts.
desc.zh: 强度高、耐磨性和机械性能好，适用于齿轮、支架、连接件及结构件。

imageAlt.en: PA nylon gear and structural part sample
imageAlt.zh: PA 尼龙齿轮与结构件样品

desc.en: High hardness, wear resistance and dimensional stability for precision plastic parts, gears and sliding mechanisms.
desc.zh: 硬度高、耐磨且尺寸稳定，适用于精密塑胶件、齿轮和滑动结构。

desc.en: Excellent transparency and surface gloss for clear covers, display parts and appearance-focused plastic products.
desc.zh: 透明度和表面光泽优良，适用于透明罩、展示件及外观塑胶件。

imageAlt.zh: PMMA 高透明高光泽零件样品

desc.en: Used for electronics, electrical components and plastic products with flame-retardant safety requirements.
desc.zh: 适用于电子产品、电气部件及对阻燃性能有要求的塑胶产品。

desc.en: Used for transparent housings, display components, protective parts and products requiring visible internal structure.
desc.zh: 适用于透明外壳、展示部件、防护件及对透明度有要求的产品。

imageAlt.en: Transparent housing and display part sample
imageAlt.zh: 透明外壳与展示件样品

title.en: Give every part its final character
title.zh: 让零件拥有最后的质感

subtitle.en: Color, marking, texture and assembly turn a molded component into a finished product experience.
subtitle.zh: 颜色、标识、质感与组装，让注塑件真正成为完整的产品体验。

desc.en: Add color and surface protection.
desc.zh: 增加颜色与表面保护。

desc.en: Print graphics or labels cleanly.
desc.zh: 适合图案与标识印刷。

imageAlt.en: Screen-printed graphic on a plastic part

desc.en: Print on curved or complex surfaces.
desc.zh: 适合曲面与异形表面。

imageAlt.en: Pad printing on a curved plastic surface

desc.en: Permanent marking and traceability.
desc.zh: 永久标记与追溯。

imageAlt.en: Laser-engraved marking on a plastic part
imageAlt.zh: 塑胶件激光雕刻标识样品

desc.en: Enhance appearance and durability.
desc.zh: 提升外观和耐久性。

desc.en: Combine plastic parts with metal hardware, screws, electronics or other accessories according to project needs.
desc.zh: 根据客户需求，将塑胶件与五金件、电子件、螺丝及其他配件进行组装。

imageAlt.en: Assembled plastic and metal component sample
imageAlt.zh: 塑胶与五金组合件样品

eyebrow.zh: 一个零件 · 一条路线

title.en: Material and finish should be decided together
title.zh: 材料与工艺，需要一起决定

desc.en: Share the application, environment and appearance target early. We will review the material, molding and finishing route as one connected decision.
desc.zh: 尽早告诉我们应用场景、使用环境和外观目标，我们会把材料、成型与表面工艺作为一条完整路线来评估。

desc.en: Strength, heat, wear and safety.
desc.zh: 强度、耐热、耐磨与安全。

desc.en: Color, clarity, texture and marking.
desc.zh: 颜色、透明度、质感与标识。

desc.en: Process, volume and delivery target.
desc.zh: 工艺、数量与交付目标。

desc.en: Send us your drawings and performance requirements, and we will recommend the right resin and finishing route.
desc.zh: 发送图纸和性能要求，我们会为您推荐合适的材料与工艺路线。
